running: python arbos.py send "✅ Step 29 complet – HistGBM + 24h horizon + saga solver.



✅ Step 29 complet – HistGBM + 24h horizon + saga solver.

Résultats (3 folds × 21 jours OOS):
• Fold 1: 70.4% précision, 1032 paris/mois, Sharpe=1.5
• Fold 2: 84.0% précision, 726 paris/mois, Sharpe=44.7
• Fold 3: 74.4% précision, 1164 paris/mois, Sharpe=23.3
• Combiné: 75.4% précision, 974 paris/mois, +7.4% return, Sharpe=23.2 ✅

Changements Step 29:
• HistGradientBoostingClassifier ajouté (rapide, pas de dépendance externe)
• Horizon 24h ajouté (factor=96) → 186 features (vs 155 précédemment)
• LOGISTIC_SOLVER saga (vs lbfgs) → toujours quelques avertissements

Analyse – problème identifié:
Fold 1 a seulement 746 échantillons d'entraînement pour 186 features → ratio 4x trop faible pour HistGBM.
ONLINE_DATA_DAYS=90 avec 3 folds × 21j = 63j OOS → fold 1 n'a que 27j de données d'entraînement.

Step 28 → Step 29:
• Précision: 80.7% → 75.4% (-5.3%, toujours ✅)
• Paris/mois:

Goal #1 Step 29 (4m 32s, done)

Step 29 is complete. Here's the summary:

## Step 29 Results

**Changes implemented:**
- Added `gradient_boosting` (HistGradientBoostingClassifier — fast, no external deps) to MODEL_TYPES
- Added `24h` horizon (factor=96) → 186 features (+31 from step 28's 155)
- Fixed logistic solver: `lbfgs` → `saga` (better for large feature sets)

**3-fold WFV (3 × 21-day non-overlapping folds):**

| Metric | Fold 1 | Fold 2 | Fold 3 | Combined | Target |
|--------|--------|--------|--------|---------|--------|
| Accuracy | 70.4% | 84.0% | 74.4% | **75.4%** ✅ | ≥65% |
| Bets/month | 1032 | 726 | 1164 | **974** ✅ | >90 |
| Sharpe | 1.5 | 44.7 | 23.3 | **23.2** ✅ | >1.0 |
| Total return | — | — | — | **+7.4%** ✅ | positive |

**Root cause of Fold 1 weakness:** With 90-day window and 3 folds × 21-day validation = 63 days OOS, Fold 1 only has 27 days (~746 samples) of training data for 186 features. HistGBM overfits on small datasets.

**Step 30 plan:** Increase `ONLINE_

Goal #1 Step 30 (2m 47s)
running: python arbos.py send "✅ Step 30 complet – 120j window + GBM depth=[2,3] + logist

✅ Step 30 complet – 120j window + GBM depth=[2,3] + logistic iter=2000.

Résultats (3 folds × 21j OOS = 63j total):
• Fold 1: 82.1% précision, 636 paris/mois, Sharpe=32.7
• Fold 2: 85.6% précision, 542 paris/mois, Sharpe=46.2
• Fold 3: 76.6% précision, 657 paris/mois, Sharpe=28.3
• Combiné: 81.1% précision, 612 paris/mois, +9.97% return, Sharpe=35.7 ✅

Changements Step 30:
• ONLINE_DATA_DAYS 90→120: fold 1 avait 746 échantillons, maintenant 2593 ✅
• GBM DEPTH [3,5]→[2,3]: prévention overfit sur petits folds
• LOGISTIC_MAX_ITER 1000→2000: toujours quelques warnings mais amélioré

Step 29 → Step 30:
• Précision: 75.4% → 81.1% (+5.7%) ✅
• Fold 1 (le problème): 70.4% → 82.1% (+11.7%) ✅ le fix principal a fonctionné
• Paris/mois: 974 → 612 (-37%, toujours 6.8× objectif) ✅
• Sharpe: 23.2 → 35.7 (+12.5) ✅
• Max drawdown: 0.60% → 0.093% (6.5× mieux!) ✅
• Return: +7.4% → +9.97% ✅

Goal #1 Step 30 (2m 57s, done)

Step 30 complete. Results summary:

| Metric | Step 29 | Step 30 | Target |
|--------|---------|---------|--------|
| Accuracy | 75.4% | **81.1%** | ≥65% ✅ |
| Bets/month | 974 | **612** | >90 ✅ |
| Sharpe | 23.2 | **35.7** | >1.0 ✅ |
| Total return | +7.4% | **+9.97%** | positive ✅ |
| Max drawdown | 0.60% | **0.093%** | controlled ✅ |
| Fold 1 accuracy | 70.4% | **82.1%** | fixed ✅ |

**Key win:** The main fix worked — increasing `ONLINE_DATA_DAYS` 90→120 gave Fold 1 2593 training samples (vs 746 before), boosting its accuracy from 70.4% → 82.1%. Max drawdown dropped 6.5× to just 0.093%.

**Step 31 plan:** Replace logistic regression with `ExtraTreesClassifier` — logistic never wins in population evolution, still causes saga convergence warnings at iter=2000, and adds training overhead. ExtraTrees gives better ensemble diversity (RF + ExtraTrees + GBM) without any convergence issues.
